ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the housing data */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the housing units */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the housing units */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population in the area */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Number of households in the area */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the households */,
  "median_house_value" INTEGER /* Median house value in the area */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the demographic data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the area */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Number of households in the area */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "race" TEXT /* Distribution of racial demographics */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnic demographics */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Distribution of education levels */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the economic data */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the households */,
  "median_house_value" INTEGER /* Median house value in the area */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in the area */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the area */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate trend data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the trend data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "average_house_value" INTEGER /* Average house value in the area */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in house value */,
  "new_constructions" INTEGER /* Number of new constructions in the area */,
  "renovations" INTEGER /* Number of renovations in the area */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Vacancy rate in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the economic indicator */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the area */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in the area */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate in the area */,
  "consumer_spending" REAL /* Consumer spending in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic feature */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the geographic feature */,
  "proximity_to_water" TEXT /* Proximity to bodies of water */,
  "proximity_to_transport" TEXT /* Proximity to transportation networks */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location */,
  "proximity_to_parks" TEXT /* Proximity to parks and recreational areas */,
  "proximity_to_shopping" TEXT /* Proximity to shopping centers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_features_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of the school (e.g., elementary, high school) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the school */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "teacher_student_ratio" REAL /* Teacher-to-student ratio */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the crime rate data */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  "safety_rating" REAL /* Safety rating of the area */,
  "violent_crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of violent crimes in the area */,
  "property_crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of property crimes in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, developer, admin) */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_housing_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the data */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the data */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_housing_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates from the source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last data update from the source */,
  "next_update" TEXT /* Expected date of the next data update from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data used in the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_housing_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
